prompt_text: automation tools with native GitHub integration
response:
# Automation Tools with Native GitHub Integration

## CI/CD Platforms

### **GitHub Actions** (Native)
- Built directly into GitHub
- Free for public repos; generous free tier for private
- YAML workflow configuration
- 2000 free minutes/month (private repos)
- Pre-built actions marketplace

```yaml
name: CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
      - run: npm install && npm test
```

### **GitLab CI** (if using GitLab)
- Similar native integration to GitHub Actions
- More generous free tier
- Docker-first approach

---

## Code Quality & Security

| Tool | Purpose | GitHub Integration |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| **Snyk** | Vulnerability scanning | PR checks, status checks |
| **SonarCloud** | Code quality analysis | PR decorations, inline comments |
| **Dependabot** | Dependency updates | Auto PR creation |
| **CodeQL** | Security analysis | Native (via GitHub Actions) |
| **Codecov** | Coverage reports | PR badges, status checks |

---

## Issue & Project Management

| Tool | Features |
|------|----------|
| **GitHub Projects** | Native board views, automation rules |
| **Zenhub** | Agile boards, burndown charts |
| **Linear** | Fast issue tracking with PR linking |
| **Shortcut** | Sprint planning, GitHub sync |

---

## Deployment & Infrastructure

```yaml
# Example: Deploy on GitHub Release
name: Deploy
on:
  release:
    types: [published]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - run: npm run build
      - run: npm run deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
```

| Tool | Use Case |
|------|----------|
| **Vercel** | Frontend deployment, PR previews |
| **Netlify** | Static sites, preview deployments |
| **Heroku** | App deployment |
| **AWS CodeDeploy** | EC2, on-premise deployments |

---

## Notification & Monitoring

- **Slack** - Notifications via Actions
- **Discord** - Webhook integrations
- **Datadog** - CI/CD monitoring
- **PagerDuty** - Incident management

---

## Recommended Stack for Most Teams

```
GitHub Actions → Code Quality (SonarCloud) → 
  → Dependency Management (Dependabot) → 
    → Deployment (Vercel/Netlify) → 
      → Notifications (Slack)
```

**What type of automation are you most interested in?** (testing, deployments, security, etc.)
